jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag is the recommended way to compile for a specific Java version in modern Maven/Java setups, ensuring API compatibility with the target JDK.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace deprecated Mockito matchers with their modern equivalents.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: org.mockito.Matchers is deprecated and may be removed in future Mockito versions; ArgumentMatchers is the standard.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace deprecated Mockito any() matcher with nullable() for null-safe matching.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: any() is deprecated in favor of more specific matchers like nullable() to avoid ambiguity.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Framework version to 6.x to support Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Upgrade Spring Security version to 6.x to align with Spring Framework 6.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and Java 17.
Upgrade Lombok version to a recent release compatible with Java 17.
